messages.content:
UNIFIED PROTOCOL PHASE A â€” POST-SHIP AUDIT of a racing esports venue system.

This system has had 40+ security/infrastructure commits in this session. You are the FINAL auditor. Your job is to find what is STILL broken, STILL missing, or NEWLY broken by the fixes.

== SYSTEM INVENTORY ==
- 8 simulator pods (Windows, rc-agent + rc-sentry + rc-process-guard)
- Server .23 (racecontrol Rust/Axum, port 8080, SQLite)
- James PC .27 (comms-link relay, go2rtc, Ollama, rc-sentry-ai, fleet-monitor)
- POS PC .20 (rc-pos-agent)
- Bono VPS (cloud racecontrol, comms-link WS server, whatsapp-bot, pm2)
- NVR .18 (13 Dahua cameras)
- TP-Link router .1 (consumer, no VLAN)
- 4 Next.js apps (kiosk, web, admin, pwa)

== WHAT WAS FIXED THIS SESSION ==
1. Fleet monitor: 6 parallel checks every 5min (rc-sentry, MAINTENANCE_MODE, cloud sync, NVR, AI systems, fleet health). Promise.allSettled. Restart-event crash loop detection.
2. Deploy lock: atomic wx flag, 30min auto-expire, wired into deploy-server.sh
3. Pre-push hooks: both repos, auto-install via npm postinstall
4. Financial E2E tests: 8 tests covering full wallet lifecycle
5. SHA256 verification: in deploy-server.sh step 7b, rollback on mismatch
6. Frontend staleness: daily scheduled task + quality gate suite 6
7. NEXT_PUBLIC_ env validation: wired into run-all.sh
8. GitHub Actions CI: rust tests + security scan + comms-link gate
9. Kiosk server-side middleware: JWT structure + exp validation before render
10. Exec command blocklist: binary-level blocking + .exe normalization + caret stripping
11. CORS: restricted from entire subnet to explicit 12 IPs
12. Admin PIN: removed from test code
13. Permissive JWT: deleted dead code
14. WhatsApp webhook: Evolution fail-closed + Kapso mandatory secret + phoneNumberId validation
15. Staff phone numbers: moved from hardcoded to env vars
16. rc-sentry-ai: service key auth via from_fn_with_state
17. Process guard: 80% safety valve prevents mass kill on empty whitelist
18. NVR credentials: removed hardcoded defaults, read from env
19. People tracker: 90-day retention purge with file cleanup
20. WhatsApp messages: anonymize after 90 days (preserve insights)
21. Marketing Google OAuth: moved from hardcoded to env vars
22. Credential rotation script: generates + deploys new secrets to all machines
23. Incident response plan: SEV-1 to SEV-4, 6-step procedure
24. Staff off-boarding checklist: 12 access revocation items
25. Lap time integrity: upper bound + driver/pod validation + suspect flagging
26. Database backup script: daily backup of all 5 SQLite DBs + configs
27. BUG-01 fix: seed_pods_on_startup now writes to DB not just in-memory
28. Persistent admin lockout: admin_lockout table in SQLite
29. Input validation module: phone, email, name, booking limits
30. Windows Firewall rules: pod-firewall-rules.ps1 compensates for no VLAN
31. PSK rotation: comms-link PSK synced between James and Bono VPS
32. pod-agent: deprecated with DEPRECATED.md
33. Cafe menu: cost_price stripped from public API response

== WHAT IS STILL INCOMPLETE (known) ==
- Credential rotation script created but only PSK was actually rotated (JWT, relay, sentry key still old)
- admin_lockout DB table created but auth code not wired to use it yet
- input_validation module created but not wired into routes.rs handlers yet
- Firewall rules script created but not deployed to pods yet
- Router admin password not changed (waiting for user credentials)
- No Windows patching/WSUS
- No antivirus/EDR
- No USB port lockdown
- No kiosk escape prevention (Group Policy)
- No pod disk imaging (Deep Freeze/Write Filter)
- SQLite encryption guide exists but not implemented (needs SQLCipher C lib)
- Merge conflicts in auth/middleware.rs (from parallel Phase 257)

== YOUR TASK ==
1. Are any of the 33 fixes INCOMPLETE or INCORRECTLY implemented?
2. Did any fix BREAK something else (regression)?
3. Are there gaps that NO audit pass has ever checked?
4. What is the honest overall system score now (1-10) for each of the 10 layers?
5. What are the TOP 3 things to fix NEXT for maximum security improvement?

Be brutally honest. No points for effort â€” only for working, deployed, verified fixes.
